description: Execute Phase 3 of the V0.8 Docs Refactoring: Generate the actual high-quality, Archon-standard documentation content (GitBook structure, Markdown, Mermaid diagrams) across the EN/ZH directories and root README.md, based on the blueprints from Phase 1 and 2.
scope: 1. Create the GitBook directory structure (getting-started, core-concepts, guides, reference) in documentation/EN/ and ZH/. 2. Write SUMMARY.md for navigation. 3. Write rich markdown content focusing on the 'Contract / Workflow / Governance' triumvirate, the 17 built-in workflows, and L2/L3 dual-track gating. 4. Use concrete JSON/YAML examples and Mermaid diagrams. 5. Remove legacy flat markdown files in the documentation roots.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO modifications to src/mcp-server/, bin/, or active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression. NO implementation of runtime execution code.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/.
Executing without an approved Phase 3 contract.
